title: Petersburg Medical Center’s old septic pipes are buckling; facility engineers to hold off on major repairs as new hospital is underway
summary: A piece of failed septic line. (Photo courtesy of Petersburg Medical Center) Petersburg Medical Center’s septic pipes are failing, and its maintenance department is trying to stretch the aging system to its limits until the new hospital facility is built. title: Feds pinch Southeast Alaska skippers for illegally transporting crab
summary: Commercial Tanner crab in Petersburg, Alaska in 2023. (Photo by Andy Wright) Three men are charged in federal court for illegally transporting Alaska crab to sell in Washington.
